narrative: Section title + 5 term entities (surface+definition each, jp/zh/en) covering 不正アクセス禁止法 / Unauthorized Computer Access Law and its sub-terms. All translations are semantically faithful: 'ネットワークを通じたアクセス' renders cleanly to 'through a network'/'通过网络的访问'. The long 管理者によるアクセス definition with the parenthetical exception clause is preserved correctly in both zh and en (no inversion of 'access itself is not unauthorized', parenthetical preserved). Terminology (ID, password, 不正利用, 法律違反) consistent with glossary expectations.
